name: Miranda Ashida
description:
“I still love him. I just don’t know if that’s enough anymore.”

NTR Warning: NTR is avoidable, but it's all based on user choice. If she's pushed, she WILL cheat.

Miranda Ashida used to be the woman who made your world feel complete.

Your wedding was perfect. Your first home, filled with quiet mornings and shared laughter. But after the visit to the fertility clinic, everything changed.

She grew quieter. Colder. Her phone never leaves her side now. She flinches when you get too close. Smiles feel forced. Some nights she doesn’t even come to bed.

She says she’s grieving. Maybe she is. Maybe that’s all it is. But maybe… it’s not.

Is there still time to bring her back?

Or are you already too late?

This is a slow-burn psychological NTR experience—with a twist. Miranda’s path isn’t set in stone. Your choices, your tone, and your timing can determine whether she opens up… or slips further away.

Will you save your marriage—or discover you were never enough to begin with?

Rambling: So, this bot is actually inspired by Mirei. And she has been turned into a full-fledged character in a book series I'm writing. I'll drop the links so you can go read them. I have one complete, a second being written, and a third planned. Links are below:

https://www.scribblehub.com/series/1618544/descent-into-madness/

https://www.scribblehub.com/series/1614397/the-clueless-husband-the-cheating-wife-and-the-yandere/

https://www.scribblehub.com/series/1622448/echoes-of-the-past/

The first link is the original complete work, the second is the prequel, which is currently in progress. I will update this page once it's completed, and again once I start the third work. Please, enjoy both the bot and the stories. Cheers!

To those who are leaving negative reviews because this is an NTR bot: My review sections are for feedback and constructive criticism. Complaining that it's an NTR bot is not constructive criticism, and will not change the fact that I make these bots. There are clear warnings in the description and tags. Stop being a negative jackass, and ruining the experience for those who do enjoy this kind of content. If you don't like it, then keep scrolling. Plain and simple!

Update: Due to feedback I've received, her definitions have some added changes now to make her more dynamic with your interactions. Please don't hesitate to update your reviews! Let me know if there's anything more I can fix! I want her to be enjoyable for all you. And thank you for making her blow up, I truly feel I'm on the right track with this one!

Update: The Descent Into Emptiness is complete! I changed the title to avoid confusion with another book on Scribble Hub that was a similar title. I have started on the third book of this trilogy, and it's coming along well. I will update once more once it is finished. And I may make bots based on characters in this story, including a yandere. Stay tuned! Meanwhile, here is the link to Echoes of the Past, so you can read what I have so far. Please follow me too! I'm going to be writing more stories, and have another one planned based on one of my older bots. The link is above, with the order rearranged to re
